response.markdownReport:
# BestStrat Report — BILLIONS/1h

## Strategy
**Name:** Capital Protection Regime Strategy  
**Detected Regime:** Risk Off (64% confidence)  
**Data Source:** Deterministic sample market data  
**CMC API Configured:** Yes
**Fallback Note:** CoinMarketCap returned no USD quote for BILLIONS.

Avoid new momentum entries until trend structure, sentiment, and volatility return to acceptable conditions.

## Why This Strategy Was Generated
- Auto Detect compared 4 candidate strategies and selected Capital Protection Regime Strategy with a 110 selection score.
- BILLIONS was classified as Risk Off, so BestStrat selected Capital Protection Regime Strategy.
- The strongest supporting signals were Regime: Risk Off (64), Volume: Strong (63), Fear & Greed: Neutral (54).
- The generated rules are constrained by volatility, liquidity, invalidation, and no-trade conditions so the output stays backtestable instead of becoming a vague trading opinion.

## Market State
- Trend: Bearish
- Volatility: Moderate
- Sentiment: Neutral
- Liquidity: High
- Latest price used by engine: 84.66003
- Candles analyzed: 720
- Data snapshot: 2026-06-16T12:05:00.000Z

## Entry Rules
- Do not open a new long setup while price remains below EMA 50
- Only consider re-entry after price recovers EMA 20 and EMA 50 alignment
- Require RSI recovery above 50 with volume above the 20-candle average

## Exit Rules
- Exit research setup if price closes below EMA 20 after attempted recovery
- Exit if RSI falls below 45
- Exit if volatility expands above the strategy threshold

## Risk Rules
- Use moderate sizing with maximum 40% to 55% model exposure
- Stop using this setup if strategy drawdown exceeds 8%
- Prefer capital preservation until regime improves

## Invalidation Rules
- Invalid if regime remains Risk Off after the lookback window refreshes
- Invalid if liquidity score falls below 40
- Invalid if price fails to reclaim EMA 50

## No Trade Conditions
- Risk Off regime
- Price below EMA 50
- Conflicting trend and momentum signals
- Weak liquidity or unstable volume confirmation
- Volatility spike without clear trend confirmation

## Auto Strategy Selection
BestStrat compared candidate strategies before selecting the final output.

| Rank | Focus | Strategy | Return | Max Drawdown | Win Rate | Selection Score |
|------|-------|----------|--------|--------------|----------|-----------------|
| 1 (selected) | Risk Off | Capital Protection Regime Strategy | 39.3% | 1.8% | 73% | 110 |
| 2 | Momentum | Guarded Momentum Strategy | 7.6% | 2% | 50% | 76 |
| 3 | Sentiment Divergence | Sentiment Divergence Filter Strategy | 6.2% | 4.1% | 43% | 66 |
| 4 | Regime Detection | Range Aware Mean Reversion Strategy | -9.8% | 10.9% | 19% | 20 |

Capital Protection Regime Strategy was selected because it produced the strongest risk-adjusted candidate score after comparing return, max drawdown, win rate, outperformance vs benchmark, and regime confidence.

## Backtest Results
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total Return | 39.3% |
| Win Rate | 73% |
| Max Drawdown | 1.8% |
| Number of Trades | 11 |
| Average Trade Return | 5.7% |
| Best Trade | 15.1% |
| Worst Trade | -1.8% |
| Risk Adjusted Score | 100 |
| Buy-and-Hold Benchmark | -9.3% |
| Outperformance vs Benchmark | 48.6% |
| Fee Assumption | 0.10% per entry or exit |
| Model Exposure | 55% |

## Backtest Methodology
- Starting capital: $1,000 simulated
- Fees: 0.10% per entry or exit
- Model exposure: 55%
- Buy-and-hold benchmark: token return over the same backtest window
- Candles analyzed: 720
- Data snapshot: 2026-06-16T12:05:00.000Z
- Snapshot policy: same symbol, timeframe, and lookback reuse one market snapshot briefly so repeated backtests remain consistent

## Signal Breakdown
| Signal | Score | Status | Reason |
|--------|-------|--------|--------|
| RSI | 40 | Weak | RSI is 33.8, showing weak momentum. |
| MACD | 34 | Bearish | MACD is below its signal line. |
| Volume | 63 | Strong | Latest volume is 1.4x its 20-candle average. |
| Fear & Greed | 54 | Neutral | Fear and Greed proxy score is 54.1 from the market dataset. |
| Sentiment | 41 | Neutral | Sentiment proxy score is 41.1, derived from quote momentum and market context. |
| Volatility | 45 | Moderate | ATR is 5.15% of price, so volatility is moderate. |
| Regime | 64 | Risk Off | Composite regime model classified BILLIONS as Risk Off. |

## LLM Skill Authorship
- Invocation name: beststrat.generate_strategy
- Skill role: repeatable LLM workflow for turning CMC market context into a backtestable strategy spec
- Required inputs: symbol, timeframe, lookbackDays, riskLevel, strategyFocus
- Required outputs: regime, rationale, rules, backtest, methodology, JSON, Markdown, CMC Skill output, LLM Skill output

## Strategy Skill Notes
- Product role: Quantopian-style crypto strategy generation Skill authored as an LLM Skill
- Output type: backtestable strategy specification
- Execution: none
- Wallet connection: none

---
Generated by BestStrat. Research strategy specification only. Not financial advice. No trade execution.

skill.name: BestStrat
skill.description: A repeatable LLM Skill for converting CMC market context into a backtestable crypto strategy specification.
skill.intendedAgentUse: Use when a user asks for a crypto trading strategy research spec, not when they ask to place a live trade.

userIntentExamples: Generate a strategy for CAKE on 1h candles with moderate risk.
Create a backtestable momentum strategy for BNB.
Detect the market regime for ETH and write entry, exit, and risk rules.

dataContext.label: Deterministic sample market data
dataContext.fallbackReason: CoinMarketCap returned no USD quote for BILLIONS.
dataContext.cachePolicy: Same symbol, timeframe, and lookback reuse one market snapshot for five minutes so repeated backtests stay consistent.

workflow.name: Normalize user request
workflow.instruction: Extract symbol, timeframe, lookbackDays, riskLevel, and strategyFocus. Ask for missing required inputs when needed.

workflow.name: Fetch CMC market context
workflow.instruction: Use CoinMarketCap data when configured. If unavailable, clearly mark deterministic fallback data.

workflow.name: Classify market regime
workflow.instruction: Score trend, momentum, volume, sentiment, volatility, and liquidity before selecting a regime.

workflow.name: Auto-select strategy candidate when requested
workflow.instruction: When strategyFocus is auto, compare momentum, risk-off, sentiment-divergence, and regime-detection candidates by risk-adjusted score before selecting a strategy.

workflow.name: Generate strategy rules
workflow.instruction: Return entry, exit, risk, invalidation, position sizing, and no-trade conditions as explicit testable rules.

workflow.name: Backtest and compare
workflow.instruction: Run the strategy over the selected lookback window and compare it with a buy-and-hold benchmark using stated fee assumptions.

workflow.name: Return structured output
workflow.instruction: Return JSON, Markdown, CMC Skill output, and LLM Skill output without any live execution instructions.
